items.title: Stay Calm
items.description: Keep a calm mind before casting a hexagram. Avoid divination when emotionally agitated or mentally restless.

items.title: One Question, One Reading
items.description: Don't repeatedly cast for the same question in a short period. Each divination should address one specific question.

items.title: Don't Divine for Others
items.description: Each person should divine for their own questions. Avoid deciding for others or interfering with their destiny.

items.title: Asking Approach
items.description: When asking questions, include both the [Question + Context] for more accurate interpretations.

items.title: Example 1: Career Decision
items.content: Should I accept this new job offer? I've been working at a stable company for 5 years, and the new company offers higher pay but comes with greater risks.

items.title: Example 2: Relationship Question
items.content: My partner and I have been arguing frequently lately. Will this relationship last? We've been together for two years, and recent work pressure has led to communication problems.

items.title: Example 3: Educational Choice
items.content: Which major would be more suitable for me? I have interests in both arts and technology, but I'm uncertain which direction better aligns with my long-term development.

contact.prefix: If you have any questions, please contact

IChingHero.title: Free I Ching AI Reading
IChingHero.description: AI-powered interpretations based on the online I Ching system.
IChingHero.questionPlaceholder: What would you like to ask the I Ching today? For better readings, include both your question and relevant context.
IChingHero.castingDescription: We'll use the traditional coin toss method to cast your hexagram, simulating the ancient I Ching divination process.
